LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KENNETH PAGE'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT - THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT PAGE FAILS TO PRESENT SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT THE SETTLEMENT WAS IN THE BALLPARK. SEE TECH-BILT, INC. V. WOODWARD-CLYDE & ASSOC., (1985) 38 CAL.3D 488. DEFENDANT NEEDS TO PRESENT EVIDENCE SHOWING A ROUGH APPROXIMATION OF PLAINTIFF'S RECOVERY AND THE DEFENDANTS' PROPORTIONATE LIABILITY. SEE MATTCO FORGE, INC. V. ARTHUR YOUNG & CO. (1995) 38 CAL.APP.4TH 1337, 1350, N.6. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED THAT EVIDENCE AND DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S NOVEMBER 2 ORDER TO PROVIDE THAT SUPPLEMENTAL EVIDENCE BY NOVEMBER 16. THE COURT REJECTS CHICAGO TITLE'S OTHER ARGUMENTS. THE STAY IS LIFTED FOR THE LIMITED PURPOSE OF HEARING THIS MOTION AND CHICAGO TITLE IS A JOINT TORTFEASOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153

Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement By Deft Kenneth Page; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW WEBB, TEL. NO. (510) 444-4224 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DENA CRUZ OF BRYAN CAVE, TEL. NO. 268-1975 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE;
ATTY. MARK J. ROMEO, TEL. NO. 395-9315 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT KENNETH PAGE;
ATTY. PETER C. CATALANOTTI OF MANNING & KASS, TEL. NO. 217-6900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS SOTHEBYS INTERNALTIONAL REALTY & COSTALDO.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE ON THE RECORD IN ORDER FOR THE COURT TO READ AND CONSIDER THE DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DAMAGES SUBMITTED BY THE PLAINTIFF AND WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KENNETH PAGE'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Request For Judicial Notice - The motion is denied without prejudice. Defendant Page fails to present substantial evidence showing that the settlement was in the ballpark. See Tech-Bilt, Inc. v. Woodward-Clyde & Assoc., (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. Defendant needs to present evidence showing a rough approximation of plaintiff's recovery and the defendants' proportionate liability. See Mattco Forge, Inc. v. Arthur Young & Co. (1995) 38 Cal.App.4th 1337, 1350, n.6. Defendant has not presented that evidence and did not comply with the Court's November 2 order to provide that supplemental evidence by November 16. The Court rejects Chicago Title's other arguments. The stay is lifted for the limited purpose of hearing this motion and Chicago Title is a joint tortfeasor. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =302/EG
